REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN TO CHALLENGE THE 2011 ASSIGNMENT. ANY ALLEGED RECENT ASSIGNMENT TO US BANK, ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, WOULD ONLY BE IMPROPER IS 2011 ASSIGNMENT WAS IMPROPER. SINCE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS TO CHALLENGE THE 2011 ASSIGNMENT HAS RUN, THIS ACTION AS A WHOLE IS BARRED. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THE LATEST ASSIGNMENT SOMEHOW REVIVES THE BARRED CLAIMS. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THIS PRE-FORECLOSURE CLAIM MAY BE BROUGHT. FINALLY, ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF THE NOTE AND THE DEED OF TRUST WERE SOLD TO THE SPONSOR OF THE MORGAN STANLEY MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-AR FOR THE PURPOSE OF INCLUDING THE LOAN INTO THAT TRUST. 2011 ASSIGNMENT PLACED THE LOAN IN THE HANDS OF THE TRUSTEE OF THE MORGAN STANLEY MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-AR, THUS THE LOAN ENDED UP WHERE IT WAS INTENDED TO BE SINCE APRIL 28, 2006. THE FORECLOSING ENTITY IS ONE THAT WAS AN INTENDED BENEFICIAL OWNER ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFFS ALLEGATIONS AND ARGUMENTS IN OPPOSITION. (SEE OPPOSITION 1: 23-26 AND 3:3-15). RATCLIFF V. JP MORGAN CHASE 2017 WL 2876141. ORDER AND JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL SIGNED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Megan Kelly, 415.398.3344 of Severson & Werson for Defendants/Moving parties BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The Statute of Limitations has run to challenge the 2011 Assignment. Any alleged recent assignment to US Bank, according to Plaintiff, would only be improper is 2011 Assignment was improper. Since the Statute of Limitations to challenge the 2011 assignment has run, this action as a whole is barred. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that the latest assignment somehow revives the barred claims. Further, Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that this pre-foreclosure claim may be brought. Finally, according to Plaintiff the note and the Deed of Trust were sold to the sponsor of The Morgan Stanley Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-AR for the purpose of including the loan into that Trust. 2011 Assignment placed the loan in the hands of the Trustee of The Morgan Stanley Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-AR, thus the loan ended up where it was intended to be since April 28, 2006. The foreclosing entity is one that was an intended beneficial owner according to Plaintiffs allegations and arguments in opposition. (See Opposition 1: 23-26 and 3:3-15). Ratcliff v. JP Morgan Chase 2017 WL 2876141. Order and judgment of dismissal signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
